problems.title: 内连接查询
problems.description: 查询学生及其班级信息，使用内连接。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

problems.requirement: 使用 INNER JOIN 连接 students 和 classes 表。
problems.answer: SELECT students.name, classes.name AS 班级 FROM students INNER JOIN classes ON students.class_id = classes.id;
problems.expectedResult: 返回学生及其班级信息
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用内连接

problems.title: 左连接查询
problems.description: 查询所有学生及其班级信息，没有班级的学生也要显示。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

initialData: INSERT INTO students VALUES (2, '李四', NULL)
problems.requirement: 使用 LEFT JOIN 连接 students 和 classes 表。
problems.answer: SELECT students.name, classes.name AS 班级 FROM students LEFT JOIN classes ON students.class_id = classes.id;
problems.expectedResult: 返回所有学生及其班级信息
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用左连接

problems.title: 右连接查询
problems.description: 查询所有班级及其学生信息，没有学生的班级也要显示。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

problems.requirement: 使用 RIGHT JOIN 连接 students 和 classes 表。
problems.answer: SELECT students.name, classes.name AS 班级 FROM students RIGHT JOIN classes ON students.class_id = classes.id;
problems.expectedResult: 返回所有班级及其学生信息
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用右连接

problems.title: 多表连接
problems.description: 查询学生、班级和课程信息，连接三张表。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

tables.name: courses
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE courses (id INT PRIMARY KEY, student_id INT, course_name VARCHAR(50))

problems.requirement: 连接 students、classes 和 courses 三张表。
problems.answer: SELECT students.name AS 学生, classes.name AS 班级, courses.course_name AS 课程 FROM students INNER JOIN classes ON students.class_id = classes.id INNER JOIN courses ON students.id = courses.student_id;
problems.expectedResult: 返回学生、班级和课程信息
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确连接三张表

problems.title: 自连接查询
problems.description: 查询员工及其上级信息，使用自连接。

tables.name: employees
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE employees (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), manager_id INT)

initialData: INSERT INTO employees VALUES (1, '张三', NULL)
problems.requirement: 使用自连接查询员工及其上级。
problems.answer: SELECT e.name AS 员工, m.name AS 上级 FROM employees e LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.manager_id = m.id;
problems.expectedResult: 返回员工及其上级信息
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用自连接

problems.title: 连接查询带条件
problems.description: 查询一班的所有学生及其班级信息。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

problems.requirement: 连接查询并添加 WHERE 条件。
problems.answer: SELECT students.name, classes.name AS 班级 FROM students INNER JOIN classes ON students.class_id = classes.id WHERE classes.name = '一班';
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用连接查询带条件

problems.title: 连接查询带聚合
problems.description: 查询每个班级的学生人数。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

problems.requirement: 连接查询并使用 GROUP BY 统计。
problems.answer: SELECT classes.name AS 班级, COUNT(students.id) AS 学生人数 FROM classes LEFT JOIN students ON classes.id = students.class_id GROUP BY classes.id, classes.name;
problems.expectedResult: 返回每个班级的学生人数
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确使用连接查询带聚合

problems.title: USING 关键字
problems.description: 使用 USING 关键字连接两张表。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

problems.requirement: 使用 USING(class_id) 连接两张表（需要调整表结构）。
problems.answer: SELECT students.name, classes.name AS 班级 FROM students INNER JOIN classes ON students.class_id = classes.id;
problems.expectedResult: 返回学生及其班级信息

problems.title: NATURAL JOIN
problems.description: 使用自然连接查询学生和班级信息。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

problems.requirement: 使用 NATURAL JOIN 连接（需要调整表结构使其有相同列名）。
problems.answer: SELECT students.name, classes.name AS 班级 FROM students INNER JOIN classes ON students.class_id = classes.id;
problems.expectedResult: 返回学生及其班级信息

problems.title: 复杂连接查询
problems.description: 查询学生、班级、课程和成绩信息，连接四张表，并筛选成绩大于80的记录。

tables.name: students
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE students (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), class_id INT)

tables.name: classes
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE classes (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

tables.name: courses
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE courses (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50))

tables.name: scores
tables.definition: CREATE TABLE scores (id INT PRIMARY KEY, student_id INT, course_id INT, score INT)

problems.requirement: 连接四张表并筛选成绩>80。
problems.answer: SELECT students.name AS 学生, classes.name AS 班级, courses.name AS 课程, scores.score AS 成绩 FROM students INNER JOIN classes ON students.class_id = classes.id INNER JOIN scores ON students.id = scores.student_id INNER JOIN courses ON scores.course_id = courses.id WHERE scores.score > 80;
problems.judgeRule: 检查是否正确连接四张表并筛选
